Description.Name: It isn't Fair...
Description.Details: The Argo hums with its usual steady rhythm as you move through one of its narrow passageways, bulkheads close and the lighting dim in that perpetual, shipboard twilight. You nearly pass {TGT_MW.OBJ} before you realize {TGT_MW.Subj}{TGT_MW.Gender?NonBinary:'re|Default:'s} not just another crew member in transit—[[TGT_MW,{TGT_MW.Callsign}]] is waiting, shoulder against the wall, arms crossed like {TGT_MW.Gender?NonBinary:'ve|Default:has} been there a while. {TGT_MW.Subj_C} {TGT_MW.Gender?NonBinary:straighten|Default:straigthens} as you approach, blocking your path without quite making it an order. No hesitation this time. No pretense either. "Commander," {TGT_MW.Subj_C} {TGT_MW.Gender?NonBinary:say|Default:says}, voice tight with restrained frustration, "nothing's changed. More simulator hours. Still no real combat drops. So I'm asking again—why?" You stop in the corridor, with the hum of the Argo filling the space between you. This isn't a new conversation—and neither of you pretends it is.

Description.Name: Placate {TGT_MW.Callsign} changes are coming.
Description.Details: Placation

Description.Name: Placate MW (malevolent)
Description.Details:
You exhale slowly. "I told you before—you're close. That hasn't changed. Contracts have been tight, deployments selective. I'm not going to throw you into a meaningless drop just to satisfy impatience."

{TGT_MW.DET} expression hardens. "You said soon."

"And I meant it," you reply, though your tone carries less certainty now. "Stay ready. When the right contract comes, you'll be on the list."

{TGT_MW.Subj_C} {TGT_MW.Gender?NonBinary:don't|Default:doesn't} look convinced—but {TGT_MW.Subj_C} {TGT_MW.Gender?NonBinary:don't|Default:doesn't} argue further.

Description.Name: I need you on the Argo
Description.Details: Lie to {TGT_MW.Callsign} [dishonest]

Description.Name: Lie to MW (malevolent)
Description.Details:
You lean forward again, voice low but practiced now. "I still need you here. Training rotations have held together because of you. Sim performance across the board is up—you've been keeping this outfit sharp."

{TGT_MW.Subj_C} {TGT_MW.Gender?NonBinary:stare|Default:stares} at you, longer this time. "That's the same thing you said before."

"Because it's still true."

"Or because it's convenient," {TGT_MW.Subj_C} {TGT_MW.Gender?NonBinary:counter|Default:counters}. "You ever planning to replace me in that role?"

You don't answer directly. "You're where I need you."

{TGT_MW.DET} jaw tightens, and {TGT_MW.Subj_C} {TGT_MW.Gender?NonBinary:stare|Default:stares} at you long before turning and walking away.

Description.Name: [Compensate bonus up to ¢2,400,000 C-Bills]
Description.Details: Pay {TGT_MW.Callsign} owed backpay.

Description.Name: Compensate {TGT_MW.Callsign} (malevolent)
Description.Details:
You bring up the same console controls, already knowing where this is going. "You've been compensated again for your readiness. That hasn't changed either."

{TGT_MW.Subj_C} {TGT_MW.Gender?NonBinary:let|Default:lets} out a short, humorless laugh. "C-Bills again."

"It's acknowledgment..."

"It's not a combat record," {TGT_MW.Subj_C} {TGT_MW.Gender?NonBinary:cut|Default:cuts} in. "I told you that. No deployments means no advancement, no reputation. You can pay me all you want—I'm still going nowhere."

You hold firm. "You're part of this company."

"For now," {TGT_MW.Subj} {TGT_MW.Gender?NonBinary:reply|Default:replies} quietly. "But not for anything that matters."

"It's not a combat record," {TGT_MW.Subj_C} {TGT_MW.Gender?NonBinary:cut|Default:cuts} in. "I told you that. No deployments means no advancement, no reputation. You can pay me all you want—I'm still going nowhere."

You hold firm. "You're part of this company."

"For now," {TGT_MW.Subj} {TGT_MW.Gender?NonBinary:reply|Default:replies} quietly. "But not for anything that matters."

Description.Name: Compensate {TGT_MW.Callsign} (bored)
Description.Details:
You bring up the same console controls, already knowing where this is going. "You've been compensated again for your readiness. That hasn't changed either."

{TGT_MW.Subj_C} {TGT_MW.Gender?NonBinary:let|Default:lets} out a short, humorless laugh. "C-Bills again."

"It's acknowledgment..."

"It's not a combat record," {TGT_MW.Subj_C} {TGT_MW.Gender?NonBinary:cut|Default:cuts} in. "I told you that. No deployments means no advancement, no reputation. You can pay me all you want—I'm still going nowhere."

You hold firm. "You're part of this company."

"For now," {TGT_MW.Subj} {TGT_MW.Gender?NonBinary:reply|Default:replies} quietly. "But not for anything that matters."

Description.Name: Fire {TGT_MW.Callsign}
Description.Details: [Terminate Contract]

Description.Name: Terminate {TGT_MW.Callsign}'s contract
Description.Details: You don't waste time this round. "If you're here to repeat the same complaints, save it. My answer hasn't changed." "Of course it hasn't," {TGT_MW.Subj_C} {TGT_MW.Gender?NonBinary:snap|Default:snaps}. "Because nothing has. I've been sitting here wasting time while my career dies in a simulator." "You're still alive," you say coldly. "And that's all I am here," {TGT_MW.Subj_C} {TGT_MW.Gender?NonBinary:fire|Default:fires} back. "Alive—and irrelevant." Silence stretches for a beat. "Then we're done," you decide. "Your contract is terminated. Effective immediately." {TGT_MW.Subj_C} {TGT_MW.Gender?NonBinary:don't|Default:doesn't} look surprised this time—just angry. "Should've done that the first time." "Maybe," you reply. "But I don't make the same mistake twice." {TGT_MW.Subj_C} {TGT_MW.Gender?NonBinary:turn|Default:turns} sharply and stride for the hatch. "Yeah," {TGT_MW.Subj_C} {TGT_MW.Gender?NonBinary:throw|Default:throws} over {TGT_MW.DET} shoulder, "neither will I." {TGT_MW.DET} footsteps echo as {TGT_MW.Subj_C} {TGT_MW.Gender?NonBinary:walk|Default:walks} away, and the Argo keeps humming like nothing at all has changed.
